assertions.text: 包含 CREATE TABLE STREAM ON TABLE ods.orders，MODE = STANDARD
assertions.evidence: CREATE TABLE STREAM ods.orders_stream ON TABLE ods.orders MODE = STANDARD

assertions.text: DWD 层动态表消费 stream，过滤 _change_type IN ('insert', 'update_postimage')

assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE dwd.orders_latest TARGET_LAG = '1 minutes' VCLUSTER = default_ap
CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE dws.orders_daily_status_agg TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM

assertions.text: DWS 层按日期和 status 分组，包含 COUNT 和 SUM 聚合
assertions.evidence: GROUP BY DATE(updated_at), status; COUNT(*) AS order_cnt, SUM(amount) AS total_amount

assertions.text: 包含验证命令（SHOW DYNAMIC TABLE REFRESH HISTORY 或 SHOW TABLE STREAMS）
assertions.evidence: SHOW TABLE STREAMS IN ods; SHOW DYNAMIC TABLE REFRESH HISTORY dwd.orders_latest LIMIT 5; SHOW DYNAMIC TABLE REFRESH HISTORY dws.orders_daily_status_agg LIMIT 5
